Get 3 months of personalized health coaching.
Try it on us

Your personal health coach, built with Gemini.

Google Health Premium unlocks fitness, sleep, and health coaching that adapts to you.

Your personal health coach, built with Gemini.

Google Health Premium unlocks fitness, sleep, and health coaching that adapts to you.

Google Health. Developed with Stephen Curry and our panel of experts.

Science-backed guidance for your health and wellness journey.

Built with Gemini to deliver proactive, personal, and adaptive coaching to bring out your best.

Fitness plans for your big goals and quick pivots.

A path to the sleep you need, every night.

Fitness

Personalized plans from the first “hello.”

It starts with a conversation. You tell Google Health Coach about your preferences and routines, and it follows your lead with fitness plans that fit your life – all built with Gemini.

Google Health Coach keeps track of your daily routines and long-term goals, creating a personalized fitness plan and day-by-day workouts tailored to your schedule.

Google Health Coach keeps track of your daily routines and long-term goals, creating a personalized fitness plan and day-by-day workouts tailored to your schedule.

To uncover your fitness patterns, your AI-powered coach spots trends in your data, asks follow-up questions, and shares proactive insights and recommendations.

To uncover your fitness patterns, your AI-powered coach spots trends in your data, asks follow-up questions, and shares proactive insights and recommendations.

Your AI-powered coach continually adjusts workout plans based on what’s going on in your life, so you get the right guidance when and how you need it.

Your AI-powered coach continually adjusts workout plans based on what’s going on in your life, so you get the right guidance when and how you need it.

Sleep

Take the guesswork out of rest and recovery.

Google Health Coach makes sense of your sleep data and offers science-backed, actionable advice, helping you wake up ready for what’s ahead.

Get detailed insights and weekly coaching spotlights that help you understand and improve your sleep.,

Get detailed insights and weekly coaching spotlights that help you understand and improve your sleep.,

Google Health’s advanced algorithms help you explore sleep duration, sleep stages, and more down to the minute.,,

Google Health’s advanced algorithms help you explore sleep duration, sleep stages, and more down to the minute.,,

The new Sleep Score is a comprehensive summary for a better understanding of your sleep details at a glance.

The new Sleep Score is a comprehensive summary for a better understanding of your sleep details at a glance.

Health and wellness

A full view of your health and wellness journey.

See how everything’s connected, spot key trends, and reach your next milestone on your terms. And when a question pops up, Google Health Coach is on call 24/7.

Stay in tune with your cycle.

Get reminders, track changes, and ask questions to know how your menstrual cycle affects your daily life.

Need insights into your health and wellness? Your coach is always ready with science-backed guidance and personalized insights, 24/7.

Need insights into your health and wellness? Your coach is always ready with science-backed guidance and personalized insights, 24/7.

Keep your nutrition aligned with your overall health goals. Seamlessly log daily macros with a quick photo or chat and get personalized insights on your progress.

Keep your nutrition aligned with your overall health goals. Seamlessly log daily macros with a quick photo or chat and get personalized insights on your progress.

Bring essential health metrics, vitals, and medical records – like lab results, allergies, and medications – in one place.,

Bring essential health metrics, vitals, and medical records – like lab results, allergies, and medications – in one place.,

Unlock personalized coaching built with Gemini for your fitness, sleep, and health with Google Health Premium.

Peak performance, in every arena.

Stephen Curry and his performance team join forces with Google’s trusted innovators to bring you Google Health and a special edition band for Google Fitbit Air.
Shop Google Fitbit Air

Co-developed by trusted experts.,

Gary Bennett, PhD
Professor and dean of the Trinity College of Arts & Sciences at Duke University.
Daniel Buysse, MD
Professor and the endowed chair in sleep medicine at the University of Pittsburgh School of Medicine.
Susannah Fox
Former Chief Technology Officer of the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services.
Michael Grandner, PhD
Director of the sleep and health research program at the University of Arizona.
Abby King, PhD
Professor of epidemiology, population health, and medicine at Stanford University School of Medicine.
Steven Lin, MD
Physician, healthcare AI thought leader, and chief of general primary care at Stanford.
Jane Oldenburg, FHIMSS
Principal in participatory health counseling and thought leader on consumer health information.
Rhonda Patrick, PhD
Biomedical scientist focusing on genetics, nutrition, and sleep; founder of FoundMyFitness.
Ryan Rhodes, PhD
Professor and director of the Behavioural Medicine Laboratory at the University of Victoria.
Karandeep Singh, MD
Chief health AI officer for UC San Diego Health, and associate professor of medicine.
Steven Steinhubl, MD
Clinician-scientist and professor of biomedical engineering at Purdue University.

Treating your health data with the care it deserves.

Learn more about Health Data Privacy

Control your health data with easy-to-find, easy-to-use privacy settings.

Get more from Google Health with our premium membership.

With Google Health Premium, you unlock personalized coaching that’s built with Gemini and adapts to your life.

Premium

All Base benefits included, plus Google Health Coach — your personal health coach, built with Gemini:
  • Ask Coach
    Ask personalized health questions 24/7 and receive science-backed answers and evidence-based insights
  • Adaptive fitness plans
    Personalized weekly fitness plans and workouts tailored to your goals and adjustable to your life
  • Detailed sleep insights
    Personalized sleep summaries with coaching insights to help you understand and improve your sleep
  • Proactive insights
    Proactive insights and actionable guidance across fitness, sleep, and health metrics
  • Medical record summaries
    Get summaries of your medical records, and ask questions to receive deeper coach recommendations tailored to your data
  • Workout library
    Library of energizing workouts led by expert trainers and instructors
  • Mindfulness sessions
    Library of mindfulness sessions like meditation, guided breathing, relaxation, and more

Premium

Base

Included in the Google Health app when paired with watch or tracker
  • Activity tracking
    Steps, Calories, Distance, Cardio load, Readiness
  • Sleep tracking
    Sleep score, Sleep schedule, Sleep duration, and Sleep stages
  • Health tracking
    Heart rate, heart rate variability, breathing rate, blood oxygen (SpO2), medical records, and more
  • Health and wellness logging
    Log weight, nutrition, water intake, moods, cycles

Frequently asked questions.

Which phones are compatible with Google Health?

Google Health is compatible with most Android and iOS smartphones.

Find more information here.

To set up and use Google Health, you must install the Google Health app on a compatible device running one of the following operating systems:

  • Android 11.0 or newer
  • Apple iOS 16.4 or newer

A Google account is required to set up and pair your compatible wearable device with Google Health.

If you already have the Fitbit app installed, Google Health app reinstallation is not required.

Which wearable devices are compatible with Google Health?

The following Google Pixel and Google Fitbit wearable devices that are compatible with Google Health can be found here.

How do I subscribe to and activate a Google Health Premium membership?

If you have an existing wearable device compatible with Google Health, you can subscribe to a Premium membership directly from Google Store. Once purchased, you can activate the Premium membership in the Google Health app.

If you purchase a new wearable device compatible with Google Health, you can activate your Premium membership in the app.

Is the Fitbit app now the Google Health app?

Yes! Google Health brings together effortless tracking and personalized coaching that adapts to your life.

If you already have the Fitbit app installed, your app will transition to the Google Health app on your next software update. A Google account is required to log into the Google Health app.

Do I need a Google account to use Google Health?

Yes. A Google account is required to log into the Google Health app.

What is the minimum age to use Google Health Premium?

You must be over 18 years old to enroll in a Google Health Premium membership.
